questions.question: Describe the steps involved in ER-to-Relational mapping. (6 marks)
questions.hint: Define ER-to-Relational mapping and list the steps involved.

questions.question: An ER diagram shows that 'Employee' is related to 'Department' through an 'Hires' relationship, while 'Department' is related to 'Manager' through an 'Employed By' relationship. What would be the corresponding relational schema? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use Entity Relationship to determine the tables and columns in the relational schema.

questions.question: Explain the concept of generalization and specialization in ER-to-Relational mapping. Provide an example of how this would be implemented in the relational schema. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Define generalization and specialization, and provide an example of how they are implemented in relational schema design.
